functional.notes: make test passed; auth route guard scenario passed; live auth-wall curl scenario passed for /dashboard redirect, login error UX, /api/auth/current-user malformed credentials, and anonymous /api/repos. make test-e2e and focused Playwright auth runs were attempted but timed out before emitting browser test progress in this session; Ever CLI sessions expired immediately, so manual browser verification used direct HTTP responses and rendered HTML inspection.

api_contract.notes: Protected API endpoints tested through direct Rust handlers and live curl probes. Missing or malformed credentials returned application/json 401 envelopes with error.code not_authenticated; valid-cookie no-DB path returns database_unavailable only after cookie verification per existing tests.

security.notes: Unauthenticated and malformed Authorization/Cookie probes did not bypass auth, did not reflect injected token/script values, and did not leak cookie values or stack traces. OPTIONS returned 405 without Access-Control-Allow-Origin for https://evil.com.

accessibility.notes: not applicable for this feature category; QA_MODULES included base, api, security, footer only

tested_steps: Read qa-report.json (empty) and auth-002 qa-hints history, including later proxy/repository hardening entries.
Ran make test: cargo tests passed and web tests passed (650 passed).
Ran required Editorial banned-value scan with ripgrep-compatible syntax: no banned GitHub hex, Primer, or Octicon hits in web/src outside og CSS.
Ran bash .scratch/auth-route-guard-scenario.sh: 5 auth_route_guard tests passed; database-backed cases skipped because TEST_DATABASE_URL/DATABASE_URL were not exported to that script environment.
Verified live /dashboard returns 307 Location /login?next=%2Fdashboard and login error page renders Editorial tokenized HTML with Fraunces/Inter/JetBrains font classes and Continue with Google href.
Ran bash .scratch/auth-002-phase4-scenario.sh against live dev server: passed dashboard redirect, login error UX, malformed current-user 401, anonymous repos 401.
Curl probes confirmed GET /api/auth/current-user and GET /api/repos return JSON 401 for missing and malformed credentials, with no raw credential reflection.
CORS probes for /api/auth/current-user and /api/repos returned 405 without Access-Control-Allow-Origin echoing https://evil.com.

Attempted make test-e2e, focused Playwright auth/app-shell specs, and auth.spec.ts with --no-deps; all timed out before browser test progress in this Codex session, so not counted as passing evidence.
Attempted Ever CLI manual snapshot; sessions expired immediately after ever start, so not counted as passing evidence.
